CustomField.formula: IF(AND(ISPICKVAL(NATT_BluEdge_Price_Type__c ,'Optional Coverage'), CONTAINS(SBQQ__ProductCode__c, '-T0240'), SBQQ__Quote__r.NATT_BluEdge_Elite__c), NATT_Elite_Repair_Months__c, CASE(NATT_BluEdge_Price_Type__c,'Extended Basic',TEXT(CTBR_Extended_Basic_Months__c),'Major Component',TEXT(CTBR_Major_Component_Months__c),'Optional Coverage',TEXT(CTBR_Optional_Coverage_Months__c),'Elite Repair',NATT_Elite_Repair_Months__c,''))
CustomField.label: CTBR Months
